checks.reason: The node is scoped to early Sintashta-Petrovka chariots around the turn of the second millennium BCE.
A chariot is a wheeled vehicle artifact class.
Horse-drawn chariots require traction harness/tack capability.
Ridden mounts are not a prerequisite for horse-drawn chariots.
Bronze working must not stand in as unsourced broad Bronze Age context.
Chariot archery is an application, not a prerequisite for chariot vehicle technology.
